title: Eval
description: The static definition of an evaluation: which Dataset to run, with which Solvers/Agents, graded by which Scorers/Judges, under which sandbox and budget. An Eval is parameterized at execution time into a Run.

dataset_ref.description: Reference to the Dataset (by Ulid or `$id` URL).

solvers.description: Solver and/or Agent references. Each entry is a Ulid or fully-qualified `$id`. The harness resolves these against the Solver/Agent store.

scorers.description: Deterministic Scorer references. May be empty if the Eval only uses Judges.

judges.description: LLM-graded Judge references. May be empty.

sandbox_ref.description: Optional reference to a Sandbox configuration (local, docker, MCP-registered, custom).

budget_ref.description: Optional reference to a Budget root node. If absent, the Eval inherits the Run's budget tree.
